system.description:
LEVEL 3

Hexbinder's Familiar. You gain a familiar of your choice. It accompanies you on your travels and grants you a passive boon based on its kind.

LEVEL 7

Bind Malady. Your familiar can deliver your Afflictions on touch as part of its action.

LEVEL 11

Empowered Familiar. Your familiar's boons grow stronger and may now act independently in combat with your reactions.

LEVEL 15

Mighty Familiar. Your familiar can become a true Mighty companion, with its own actions, and you can command it freely in combat.
